title: Dan Hyvl
compiled_truth: Dan Hyvl is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1998-12-22 to 2001-10-17), Dan Hyvl sent 1332 and received 1240 emails, totalling 2572 interactions.
